commit_scope: Add a compiler-backed Form surface for the minimal kernel-core self image. The new Form module parses kernel-core BML source, extracts source-declared counts from KernelCoreSelf method bodies, emits KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE as a compiler-object value, and proves the image is executable and .fkb round-trippable across sibling kernels.

commands: python3 scripts/context_budget.py form/form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form/form-stdlib/compiler.fk form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form/form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-self-proof.fk form/form-stdlib/bml/kernel-core.bml

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/kernel-core-self.fk form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-image-compiler-proof.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The minimal kernel-core self image is no longer assembled only inside a proof. A named Form compiler surface now turns BML source into a KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE compiler-object, preserving source authority while producing an executable and persisted core image.
test_flows: kernel-core-compile-image parses form-stdlib/bml/kernel-core.bml through the BML declaration parser.
kernel-core-source-method-value reads RequiredPrimitiveCount, RequiredDispatchCount, and RequiredProofCount from KernelCoreSelf BodySource method tokens.
kernel-core-image-node emits a KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE with source path, image path, core name, source-declared counts, and executable witness recipes.
kernel-core-compiler-flow exposes source-scan, source-parse, source-execute, image-emit, and binary-roundtrip stages as compiler objects.
kernel-core-image-compiler-proof executes embedded add/if/do recipes and round-trips /tmp/kernel-core-compiler-image.fkb across sibling kernels.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/kernel-core-self.fk defines kernel-core-compile-image, kernel-core-image-node, and kernel-core-compiler-flow.
form/form-stdlib/kernel-core-self.fk derives core counts from KernelCoreSelf source method bodies via bml-body-source-values and str_to_int.

form/form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-image-compiler-proof.fk proves the compiler object, flow stages, source parse, source-declared counts, executable witness recipes, native .fkb write attribution, and binary round-trip.

Focused validation: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/kernel-core-self.fk form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-image-compiler-proof.fk -> 34; 1 ok, 0 divergent.
